# Anime Backlog

> **Heads up:** This was 100% AI-generated by [Claude](https://claude.ai) (Anthropic) for personal use. It does not represent my work as a developer.

A static personal page to track my anime watchlist. Automatically fetches cover art via the MyAnimeList API, organizes entries by status, and persists everything in the browser via localStorage — no backend, no login required.

**Built with:** HTML · CSS · JavaScript · [Jikan API](https://jikan.moe)

**Generated by:** Claude (Anthropic) · Personal use only
